name: Index Management — Text Search Index Creation

features.name: Dynamic Mapping Mode
features.description: Create index with dynamic: true to auto-index all fields

evals.nl_prompt: Create a text search index using dynamic mapping.
I want a full-text search index that automatically includes all existing and future fields.

features.name: Explicit Field Definitions
features.description: Create index with dynamic: false and explicit field mappings

evals.nl_prompt: Create a search index for searching plot descriptions.

features.name: Configurable Dynamic TypeSets
features.description: Use typeSets to control which field types get auto-indexed

evals.nl_prompt: Create a dynamic search index but only auto-index string and number fields.

features.name: Field Type Definitions
features.description: Define specific field types: string, number, date, objectId, boolean, geo, autocomplete, token, uuid, embeddedDocuments, document

evals.nl_prompt: Create a search index with title field as a string, year field as a number, released field as a date, genres field as a token type, title as autocomplete and netflix as boolean.

features.name: Index-Time Analyzer
features.description: Configure analyzer applied to string fields when indexing (default: lucene.standard)

evals.nl_prompt: Create a search index with English stemming on the plot field.
Index the plot field for search using the English analyzer.

features.name: Search-Time Analyzer
features.description: Configure a different analyzer for query text than index time

evals.nl_prompt: Index the plot field for search with the English analyzer but use the standard analyzer at search time.

features.name: Built-in Analyzers
features.description: Use built-in analyzers: lucene.standard, lucene.simple, lucene.whitespace, lucene.keyword, language-specific

evals.nl_prompt: Create a dynamic search index with the keyword analyzer.

features.name: Custom Analyzer
features.description: Define custom analyzer with tokenizer + filters pipeline

evals.nl_prompt: Create a dynamic search index with a custom analyzer that uses a whitespace tokenizer and a lowercase filter.

features.name: Multi Analyzer
features.description: Alternate analyzers on same field via multi for different query strategies

evals.nl_prompt: Create a search index with the title field searchable with both the standard and keyword analyzers.
evals.context: Query via path: { value: 'title', multi: 'keywordAnalyzer' }

features.name: Token Type Normalizer
features.description: Configure normalizers for token type: lowercase or none

evals.nl_prompt: Index the genres field as a token type with lowercase normalization.
Index the rated field as a token type without normalization.

features.name: Synonym Source Mappings
features.description: Configure synonym source mappings in index for synonym-aware search

evals.nl_prompt: Create an index with synonym support for movie genre terms like 'scary' and 'horror'.

features.name: Facet-Type Field Mappings
features.description: Map fields with stringFacet / numberFacet to enable $searchMeta facet queries

evals.nl_prompt: Create a search index that supports faceted search on genres and year.
evals.context: Without facet mappings, $searchMeta facet queries fail. Fields can have both facet + regular type.

features.name: Multi-Field Definitions
features.description: Index multiple fields in one index definition

evals.nl_prompt: Create an index covering the plot, fullplot, and title fields.

features.name: Stored Source Configuration
features.description: Configure storedSource to store fields on mongot for returnStoredSource

evals.nl_prompt: Create a dynamic search index that stores the title and plot fields for faster retrieval.
Create a dynamic search index that stores all fields.
Create a dynamic search index that stores everything except the fullplot field.

features.name: Index Partitioning
features.description: Set numPartitions for collections exceeding 2B documents

evals.nl_prompt: Create a dynamic search index with 4 partitions for a very large collection.
evals.context: Valid values: 1, 2, 4. Only for collections >2B docs.

name: Index Management — Vector Search Index Creation

features.name: Similarity Functions
features.description: Specify similarity: euclidean, cosine, dotProduct

evals.nl_prompt: Create a vector index on plot_embedding with 1024 dimensions using cosine similarity.
Create a vector index on plot_embedding with 1024 dimensions using Euclidean distance.
Create a vector index on plot_embedding with 1024 dimensions using dot product similarity.

features.name: Quantization
features.description: Scalar or binary quantization for reduced memory / maximum compression

evals.nl_prompt: Create a vector index on plot_embedding with 1024 dimensions and scalar quantization.
Create a vector index on plot_embedding with 1024 dimensions and binary quantization.
evals.context: Binary quantization requires euclidean similarity.

features.name: Filter Field Definitions
features.description: Define filter fields for pre-filtering in $vectorSearch

evals.nl_prompt: Create a vector index on plot_embedding with 1024 dimensions, cosine similarity, and genres and year as filter fields.
evals.context: Only declared filter fields can be used in $vectorSearch.filter. Others require post-filter $match.

features.name: Auto-Embed Type
features.description: Automated embedding generation via Voyage AI at index/query time (Preview)

evals.nl_prompt: Create a vector index that auto-generates embeddings from the plot field.
evals.context: Preview feature — exact syntax may vary.

features.name: Index Deletion
features.description: Delete an existing search index

evals.nl_prompt: Delete the index named 'old_index' from the movies collection.

features.name: Basic Text Search
features.description: Keyword search via text operator. Multi-term, multi-path, array query (implicit OR)

evals.nl_prompt: Search the plot field for movies about time travel.
Find movies with 'robot' or 'AI' in the plot.

features.name: Phrase Search
features.description: Exact phrase matching with optional slop for proximity

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies where 'save the world' appears within 2 words of each other in the plot.
Find movies containing the exact phrase 'world war' in the plot.

features.name: Fuzzy Search
features.description: Typo tolerance via fuzzy with maxEdits, prefixLength

evals.nl_prompt: Search the plot for 'vampyres' with fuzzy matching to handle the typo.
Find horror movies mentioning 'vampyres' in the plot.

features.name: Autocomplete / Typeahead
features.description: Prefix/typeahead matching

evals.nl_prompt: Find movie titles starting with 'The Dark'.
evals.context: Requires autocomplete type mapping. Fall back to wildcard if not configured.

features.name: Wildcard Search
features.description: Pattern matching with *, ?

evals.nl_prompt: Find titles matching the pattern 'Star*Wars'.

features.name: Regular Expression Search
features.description: Match via regex patterns

evals.nl_prompt: Find titles matching the regex pattern 'The.*Knight'.

features.name: Exact Value Match
features.description: Exact match on boolean, date, objectId, number, token, uuid

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies rated 'PG-13'.
evals.context: Requires field indexed as token, boolean, date, number, objectId, or uuid.

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies from exactly the year 2020.
Find documents where the type equals 'movie'.

features.name: Match Any Value in Array
features.description: Match any from array of candidates

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies rated either 'PG' or 'PG-13'.
Find movies from the years 2018, 2019, or 2020.

features.name: Range Queries
features.description: Numeric/date/objectId/token ranges with gt, gte, lt, lte

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies from the 1990s with 'heist' in the plot.
Find movies with 'mystery' in the genres field from 2010 to 2020.
Find movies with 'world war' in the plot from the last 20 years.

features.name: Proximity-Scored Search
features.description: Proximity-scored on number, date, or GeoJSON with pivot-based decay

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies closest to the year 2000, with relevance decaying over 5 years.
evals.context: pivot = distance at which score halves. For dates, pivot is in milliseconds.

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies released near January 2020.

features.name: Field Existence Check
features.description: Test for presence of indexed field

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies where the fullplot field exists.
Find movies that have an IMDB rating.

features.name: Find Similar Documents
features.description: Find similar docs based on representative terms

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies similar to The Matrix by matching on the title and plot fields.

like.title: The Matrix
like.plot: A computer hacker learns about the true nature of reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

features.name: Lucene Query String
features.description: Lucene-style query syntax

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies where title contains Batman and year is greater than 2000.

features.name: Geospatial Filtering
features.description: Filter within circle, polygon, box, MultiPolygon

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies with 'New York' in the plot near the coordinates [40.7128, -74.0060] in the location field.
evals.context: movies schema lacks geo field — assumes one exists.

features.name: Spatial Relation Queries
features.description: Relations: contains, disjoint, intersects, within

evals.nl_prompt: Find locations that intersect with this polygon.
evals.context: Requires geo type field with indexShapes: true in index.

features.name: Embedded Document Search
features.description: Query fields in arrays of embedded docs with per-doc scoring

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies where cast member 'Tom Hanks' is playing 'Forrest'.
evals.context: Requires embeddedDocuments type in index. Scoring is per embedded doc.

features.name: Vector Search within $search
features.description: vectorSearch operator inside $search for combined ANN/ENN + text pre-filters

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies semantically similar to 'space exploration' using the plot_embedding field, where the title contains 'Star'.
evals.context: Enables full text operator pre-filters alongside ANN/ENN in single $search.

features.name: Required Clauses
features.description: must — clauses that must match (affects score + filtering)

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies with 'Comedy' in genres and 'robots' in the plot.

features.name: Optional / Boosting Clauses
features.description: should — optional clauses that boost score, with minimumShouldMatch

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies with 'batman' in the title and 'batman' in the plot.

features.name: Filter-Only Clauses
features.description: filter — required clauses, no score impact

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies with 'climate change' in the plot, filtered to 'Documentary' in genres, sorted by most recent.

features.name: Exclusion Clauses
features.description: mustNot — exclude matching documents

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies with 'action' in genres but exclude those with 'superhero' in the plot.

features.name: Static Score Boost
features.description: Boost field's score with static value

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'action' in the title and plot fields, with more weight on the title.
Boost the title field score by 3x.

features.name: Dynamic Score Boost from Field
features.description: Boost dynamically using numeric field value

evals.nl_prompt: Search the plot for 'thriller' with results boosted by the imdb.rating field.
evals.context: undefined is fallback when field is missing.

features.name: Constant Score
features.description: Replace score with fixed number

evals.nl_prompt: Apply a genre filter with a constant score of 1.

features.name: Computed Score Expression
features.description: Replace score with computed expression (arithmetic, log, path-based)

evals.nl_prompt: Score results using the log of IMDB votes.
evals.context: Functions: add, multiply, log, log1p, path, constant, gauss, score.

features.name: Embedded Document Scoring
features.description: Scoring for embeddedDocument operator — aggregate across matches

evals.nl_prompt: Search embedded cast documents and use the maximum score.
evals.context: aggregate options: maximum, minimum, mean, sum (default: sum).

features.name: Score Breakdown
features.description: Enable scoreDetails for $meta: "searchScoreDetails"

evals.nl_prompt: Search the plot for 'romance' with a detailed score explanation.

features.name: Search Highlighting
features.description: Return highlighted matching text via highlight + $meta: "searchHighlights"

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'space exploration' and highlight the matching text.

features.name: Synonym-Aware Search
features.description: Expand query terms via synonym mapping in index

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'scary' and also match 'horror' and 'frightening' as synonyms.
evals.context: Requires synonym mapping in index. See IDX_TEXT_SYNONYM_SOURCE.

features.name: String Facets
features.description: Category counts via $searchMeta

evals.nl_prompt: Count movies by genre that mention 'detective'.
evals.context: Requires stringFacet mapping. See IDX_TEXT_FACET_MAPPING.

features.name: Number Facets
features.description: Bucketed counts with boundaries

evals.nl_prompt: Show a decade breakdown for movies about 'thriller'.
Search for 'thriller' faceted by genre and year.

features.name: Date Facets
features.description: Time-based bucketed counts

evals.nl_prompt: Show the quarterly distribution of 'thriller' movies in 2020.
Show the monthly distribution of 'pandemic' movies in 2020.

features.name: Exact Total Count
features.description: Exact count via $count stage or $searchMeta

evals.nl_prompt: How many movies are about outer space?
evals.context: $searchMeta is more efficient than $search + $count as it avoids fetching documents.

features.name: Fast Approximate Count
features.description: Fast approximate count with type: "lowerBound"

evals.nl_prompt: Give me a quick estimate of how many movies mention 'love'.

features.name: Count Threshold
features.description: Configure count.threshold for lowerBound accuracy (default: 1000)

evals.nl_prompt: Count 'war' movies with a threshold of 5000.

features.name: Inline Count via $$SEARCH_META
features.description: count option in $search + $$SEARCH_META variable

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'comedy' and include the total count alongside the results.

features.name: Offset-Based Pagination
features.description: Traditional $skip + $limit

evals.nl_prompt: Show page 2 of 'comedy' results with 10 per page.

features.name: Token-Based Cursor Pagination
features.description: searchAfter / searchBefore with $meta: "searchSequenceToken"

evals.nl_prompt: Show the next page after this token for 'comedy' results.
evals.context: More efficient than $skip for deep pagination. Token is opaque.

features.name: Native Sort within $search
features.description: Sort within search engine via sort option. Supports boolean, date, number, objectId, uuid, token, score

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'drama' sorted by year descending using native sort.
evals.context: More efficient than post-search $sort. Requires sort field indexed.

features.name: Post-Search Sort
features.description: Re-sort results by external fields via $sort after $search

evals.nl_prompt: Find the top 5 highest-rated movies about AI.
Search for 'pandemic' movies sorted by viewer rating.

features.name: Concurrent Search
features.description: Parallelize search across segments on dedicated search nodes

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'action' with concurrent execution enabled.
evals.context: Only effective on dedicated search nodes.

features.name: Return Stored Fields
features.description: Return stored fields from mongot instead of full doc lookup

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'thriller' using stored source for a faster response.
evals.context: Requires storedSource in index. See IDX_TEXT_STORED_SOURCE.

features.name: Return Scope for Embedded Docs
features.description: Set query context to embedded doc fields (requires returnStoredSource: true)

evals.nl_prompt: Search the embedded cast and return only the matching embedded documents.
evals.context: Requires both returnStoredSource: true and storedSource in index.

features.name: Parallel Sub-Pipelines
features.description: $facet — multiple sub-pipelines over search results (stats + top-N)

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'superhero' and return the average rating, count, and top 3 genres.

features.name: Aggregate Search Results
features.description: $group — aggregate with $avg, $sum, $push, $min/$max

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'romance' and calculate the average IMDB rating per genre.

features.name: Flatten Arrays
features.description: $unwind — flatten array fields for per-element grouping

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'comedy' and count the results per genre.

features.name: Bucket into Ranges
features.description: $bucket / $bucketAuto — bin results into ranges

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'drama' and bucket the results by IMDB rating.
Search for 'action' and auto-bucket the results by year.

features.name: Shorthand Frequency Count
features.description: $sortByCount — shorthand for $unwind → $group → $sort

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'thriller' and show the most common genres.

features.name: Join with Other Collections
features.description: $lookup — join search results with other collections

evals.nl_prompt: Find 'space' movies and include their comments from the comments collection.

features.name: Promote Embedded Document
features.description: $replaceRoot / $replaceWith — promote embedded doc to top level

evals.nl_prompt: Return only the IMDB subdocument for each search result.

features.name: Materialize Results
features.description: $out / $merge — write results to collection for caching

evals.nl_prompt: Save the 'horror' search results to a collection called 'horror_cache'.
Merge the search results into the recommendations collection.

features.name: Random Sample
features.description: $sample — random sample from search results

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'adventure' and give me 5 random picks.

features.name: Approximate Nearest Neighbor
features.description: ANN with numCandidates for recall/performance trade-off

evals.nl_prompt: Find plots that are semantically similar to this embedding.
evals.context: Best practice: numCandidates >= 20x limit.

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies similar to 'young heroes in epic struggles'.

features.name: Exact Nearest Neighbor
features.description: ENN with exact: true (no numCandidates)

evals.nl_prompt: Run an exact vector search for 'detective in a small town'.
evals.context: exact: true incompatible with numCandidates. Scans all vectors.

features.name: Pre-Filter Equality
features.description: Pre-filter on filter fields using $eq / short-form

evals.nl_prompt: Find sci-fi movies similar to 'space exploration'.
evals.context: genres must be a filter field in the vector index.

features.name: Pre-Filter Range
features.description: Pre-filter with $gt, $gte, $lt, $lte

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies from 2000 to 2020 similar to 'romantic comedy in New York'.

features.name: Pre-Filter Set Membership
features.description: Pre-filter with $in / $nin

evals.nl_prompt: Find Action or Adventure movies similar to 'car chases'.
Find movies similar to 'comedy' but not in the Romance genre.

features.name: Pre-Filter Field Existence
features.description: Pre-filter with $exists

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies similar to 'epic saga' that have a year field.

features.name: Compound Pre-Filters
features.description: Combine with $and, $or, $not, $nor

evals.nl_prompt: Find drama movies after 2010 similar to 'family struggles'.
Find Action or Thriller movies similar to 'heist'.

features.name: Post-Filter via $match
features.description: Post-filter on fields NOT in vector index

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies similar to 'epic battles' with an IMDB rating above 7.5.
evals.context: limit inflated to 50 for post-filter reduction. imdb.rating not a filter field.

features.name: Score Projection
features.description: Project similarity score via $meta: "vectorSearchScore"

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'underwater exploration' and include the similarity scores.

features.name: Sort by External Field
features.description: Sort by external field (inflated limit → $sort → $limit)

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies similar to 'coming of age' sorted by IMDB rating.
evals.context: limit: 50 to get pool before sorting. Overrides similarity order.

features.name: Explain / Performance
features.description: Analyze query performance with .explain("executionStats")

evals.nl_prompt: Analyze the vector search performance for 'space odyssey'.

features.name: Trace Document IDs
features.description: Trace specific doc IDs through pipeline via explainOptions.traceDocumentIds

evals.nl_prompt: Trace these document IDs through the vector search pipeline.

features.name: Basic Reciprocal Rank Fusion
features.description: Combine vector + text via $rankFusion

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'star wars' using both semantic and keyword search combined.
evals.context: Requires MongoDB 8.0+.

features.name: RRF with Weighted Pipelines
features.description: Weight individual pipelines in $rankFusion

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'AI' with more weight on the semantic pipeline.
Search with 70% weight on vector and 30% on text.

features.name: RRF with Score Details
features.description: Enable scoreDetails in $rankFusion

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'revenge thriller' and include a scoring breakdown.

features.name: Score Fusion — Sigmoid
features.description: Score-based fusion with sigmoid normalization

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'dystopian future' using sigmoid normalization.
evals.context: Requires MongoDB 8.2+.

features.name: Score Fusion — MinMax + Expression
features.description: Score fusion with minMaxScaler + custom combination expression

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'romantic comedy' with min-max normalization and custom scoring.

features.name: Score Fusion — Average
features.description: Score fusion with default avg combination

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'zombie apocalypse' with averaged scores.

features.name: Score Fusion — No Normalization
features.description: Score fusion with none — raw scores

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'horror' using raw scores without normalization.

features.name: Hybrid — Multiple Text Pipelines
features.description: Rank fusion combining multiple lexical pipelines on different fields

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'adventure' across both the title and plot fields and combine the results.

features.name: Hybrid — Pre-Filter via Lexical Prefilter Pattern
features.description: Use vectorSearch operator inside $search to apply an Atlas Search filter before vector scoring

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies semantically similar to 'space exploration' but only among Action genre films.

features.name: Hybrid — Post-Filter with $match
features.description: Apply a $match stage after $rankFusion/$scoreFusion to further filter results

evals.nl_prompt: Run a hybrid search for 'thriller' and then filter results to only movies released after 2000.

features.name: Score Fusion — Pipeline Weight Boost
features.description: Apply weight boost to one pipeline in $scoreFusion to increase its influence

evals.nl_prompt: Do a hybrid search for 'romantic comedy' and weight the vector results three times higher than the text results.

features.name: Hybrid Sub-pipeline — $match Filter
features.description: Use $match inside a hybrid sub-pipeline to narrow candidates before fusion

evals.nl_prompt: Find sci-fi movies similar to 'dystopian future', but in the vector pipeline only consider movies with an IMDB rating above 7.

features.name: Hybrid Sub-pipeline — $sort Within Pipeline
features.description: Sort candidates within a sub-pipeline before fusion

evals.nl_prompt: Search for 'war epic' using hybrid search. In the text pipeline, sort by year descending before taking the top 20.

features.name: Hybrid Sub-pipeline — $geoNear
features.description: Use $geoNear inside a hybrid sub-pipeline for proximity ranking

evals.nl_prompt: Find restaurants semantically similar to 'cozy Italian dining' and also rank them by proximity to coordinates [-73.99, 40.74].

features.name: Hybrid Sub-pipeline — $sample
features.description: Use $sample inside a hybrid sub-pipeline to randomize one pipeline's candidates

evals.nl_prompt: Find movies similar to 'heist adventure' using hybrid search, but randomize the text pipeline candidates to add variety.

features.name: Hybrid Sub-pipeline — $addFields Score
features.description: Use $addFields to expose searchScore within a sub-pipeline for debugging or projection

evals.nl_prompt: Run a hybrid search for 'superhero origin story' and include the individual pipeline scores in the output.

features.name: Insert Single Document
features.description: Insert a single document into a collection

evals.nl_prompt: Add a new movie called 'The Last Voyage' with year 2024 and genre 'Sci-Fi' to the movies collection.

features.name: Insert Multiple Documents
features.description: Bulk insert an array of documents into a collection

evals.nl_prompt: Insert three new products — a 'Keyboard' at $99, a 'Mouse' at $49, and a 'Monitor' at $299 — into the products collection.

features.name: Insert with Embedding Parameters
features.description: Insert documents specifying embeddingParameters for auto-embed on ingestion

evals.nl_prompt: Insert a new article with title 'MongoDB Atlas Search Guide' and body text 'Atlas Search enables full-text search...' and auto-generate a vector embedding for the body field.

features.name: Update Documents
features.description: Update matching documents using update-many

evals.nl_prompt: Set the 'status' field to 'archived' for all movies released before 1950.

features.name: Delete Documents
features.description: Delete matching documents using delete-many

evals.nl_prompt: Delete all documents in the reviews collection where the 'spam' field is true.
Remove all products with a price of 0 from the products collection.
